channel.title: Thoughts on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Thoughts on My Blog

item.title: 12 April,25
item.description:
• While reading manga I thought, why don’t I write what I think frequently.

Here ’s overview of what I’m gonna write in these sections:

  1. Whenever I think something good or bad.
  2. Any event good or bad, Write some bare minimum details about it.
  3. Any creative thoughts.

item.title: 22 may,24
item.description:
What’s happening with me.

Lag rha hai sala mai pagal ho jaunga. Apne adato k chalte kabhi kabhi aaisa lagta hai kuch kr lu apne sth just because I can’t control my habits

Sala jb bhi Naya sikhne ya janne ki tayari krta hu tb tb sala me dimag aur meri adate middle fingure dikha deti hai Mai kabhi kuch kr hi paya aur kabhi kabhi aaisa lagta hai me kr hi ni skta apne adato ko control me pata ni kyo pr aaisa hi hai.

item.title: 23 may,24
item.description:
Life on autopilot

Ok,promise no more ranting
Just trying to have fun while I can

item.title: 29 may,24
item.description:
Happiness

Why my happiness is dependent on someone else why i can’t celebrate my own success why i can’t I do something that I enjoy i feel happy about it why and why i’am always complaining. I don’t know why but I want to know I want to feel my own success my own goals that provide me happiness I should’nt depend on others to give me happiness I should be the one who create those happiness
